name: regional
invariants: output.ok === false || output.regions.every(r => typeof r.id === 'string' && r.anchor && typeof r.anchor.x === 'number')
_note: forecast.regional reads real embodied signals at each of the 7 named district anchors (deterministic per region id). World-public read — {} returns ok:true with a regions array; each region carries a deterministic anchor and hasData flips true only where the embodied_signal_log has nearby rows (no invented weather). Never no_db.
